costad
******


Description
===========

Use the CostAd CLI to manage cost monitor, cost anomaly events and
subscription list. For more information, see Cost Anomaly Detection
Overview.


Available Commands
==================

* cost-alert-subscription

  * create

  * delete

  * get

  * update

* cost-alert-subscription-collection

  * list-subs

* cost-anomaly-event

  * anomaly-events-stats

  * get

  * update

* cost-anomaly-event-collection

  * list-events

* cost-anomaly-monitor

  * create

  * delete

  * disable

  * enable

  * get

  * update

* cost-anomaly-monitor-collection

  * list-monitors
